titleStmt.title: SII 9.582: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 582. (A.R. No. 577 of 1912.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT LEPAKSHI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1459, Hēmaḷambi, Āśvīja, ba. 5, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1537 September 23, Sunday, not Monday, in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Penugoṇḍe Virappaṇṇa purchased from certain Brāhmans some vṛittis in the village of Kalanūru, surnamed Triyambaka-Nārāyaṇapura, and presented them for the service of the god Vīrēśvara of Lēpākshi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . lēpākṣivīrabhadrasya naivēdyādisamrudhayē . kalanūrāgrahārēsmin krayādivyavahārataḥ . saṁpādita
ṁ svabhaktēna vīrapaṁṇamahībhujā . vṛttikṣētrādikaṁ sarvaṁ likhyatēsmin śilātalē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1459 neya hēmaḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada Āśvīja ba 5 sōmavāradalū śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śvīvīrapratāpa śrīvīraAcutadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁ geyivuttiralu lēpā
kṣi virēśadēvarige Ātrēyagōtrada Āpastaṁbhasūtrada yejuśyākheya naṁdyela tirumalabhaṭa vupādhyāya sōma
yājigaḷa putraru Avubhaḷabhaṭṭavupādhyāya sōmayājigaḷu koṭa krayasādhanavṛtigaḷa krayasādhanakrama
veṁteṁdare nāvū naṁma Avasaranimityavāgi penugoṁḍerājya rodanāḍa kalanūrige pratināmavāda tri
yaṁbaka nāraṇāpuraveṁba sarvamānyada Agrahāradalū namage saluva vṛtigaḷa vivarā . mūlasvāmi dēvarā
yaOḍeyara nāgapaniṁda dhārāgruhītavāgi baṁda vṛti 0 . hāga pāḍi Avubhaḷadēvagaḷa makkaḷu nāgaṇaṁṇagaḷiṁda
dhārāgruhītavāgi baṁda vṛti 1 voṁdu cakārada tipābhaṭra makkaḷu śaṁkarabhaṭrayiṁdā dhārāgruhītavāgi baṁda vṛtti
1 voṁdu naṁdyela tirumalabhaṭrayiṁdā krayavāgi baṁda vṛtti 2 yaraḍu Agaḷe śaṁkhara dēvagaḷa makkaḷu banadayaniṁda kra
yavāgi baṁda vṛti 2 yaraḍu tumukūra gaṁgarsaniṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛtti 2 . yaraḍuvare saṁtheya tirumalabha
ṭra makkaḷu taṁmābhaṭa siriyaṇabhaṭa yivariṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 1 voṁdu liṁgaṇārādhyara makkaḷu vīraṇārādhyarayiṁ
da krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 0 . hāga kaḍamalakuṁṭe tiṁmaṇagaḷa makaḷu māḷapaniṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛtti 0 . Are ya
gasāḷa sūridīkṣitara makaḷu kaṁbābhaṭrayiṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 1 voṁdu nāṁgatūra naraharibhaṭra makaḷu Avu
bhaḷabhaṭraiṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti . 0 hāga kalūra gōpayana makaḷu Avubhaḷapaniṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti
1 . voṁdūvare kallūra banadarsara makaḷu caṁnapa vōbayanavariṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 1 voṁdu Aḷaviṁḍi kau
rūra tiṁmarsara makaḷu kallūra tiṁmarsaniṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 0 . Are braṁhagñāni tirumaladīkṣitara makaḷu
narasiṁhabhaṭariṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 1 voṁdu kalanūra kōnērudēvagaḷa makaḷu tiṁmapaniṁda kra
yavāgi baṁda vṛti 2 . yaraḍuvare tiṁmaṇagaḷa makaḷu māḷapaniṁda krayavāgi baṁda vṛti 0 . Are Ā vṛti
gaḷu dhārāgruhītavāgi baṁda vṛti 2 . yaraḍūhāga krayalabdhavāgi baṁda vṛti 16 . hadināruvare Ubhayaṁ vṛ
tti 18 . hadineṁṭumupāgada vṛttige kraya vṛti 1 ke kraya ghaṭivaraha 15 hadinaidu varahāna lekhadalū
kraya ghaṭiga 281 ¥ 2 . yiṁnūra yaṁbhatavoṁdu varahanu dharaṇake krayavāgi lēpākṣi vīrēśvaradēvarige
Ātrēyagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada yejuśyākheya naṁdyala tirumalabhaṭavupādhyāya sōmayājigaḷa putraru
Avubhaḷasōmayājigaḷu tatkālōcita madhyastaparikalpita vubhayavāda saṁpratipannavāda krayalakṣeṇalakṣita
krayamūlya parivartanake saluva vriti 1 ke ga 15 lekhadalu vriti 18 . ke krayava ga 281 ¥ 2 . yiṁnūra Eṁbhattavoṁ
duvarahānū dharaṇavanū divadalū sākalyavāgi kāsu vīsa sikadahāge lēpākṣivīrēśvara nijabhaktarāda lēpā
kṣada naṁdilakiseṭiyara kumāṟaru penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇagaḷa kaiyalu salisikoṁḍevāgi I hadineṁṭumupā
gada vṛttige saluva gruhārāma kṣētra nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Akṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha sādhyaṁgaḷeṁba Aṣṭabhōga tēja
svāmya sarvōtpatti samastabaḷi sahitavāda sadyaḥparicchēdavāda niṁma bhaktabhaktapāraṁparyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkavāgi
dānādivinimayavikrayaṁgaḷige yōgyavāgi saluvudū Eṁdu lēpākṣivīrēśvaradēvarige Ātrēyagōtrada Āpasta
mbhasūtrada yejuśyākheya naṁdyāla tirumalabhaṭavupādhyāya sōmayājigaḷa putraru Aubhaḷabhaṭaupādhyāya
sōmayājigaḷu tāvo taṁma strīputragñātisāmaṁtadāyādyānumatadiṁ purassaravāgi trivācā krayadānavāgi koṭa
krayadānapatra yidake sākṣigaḷu śivādīkṣitara putraru basavādīkṣitaru raṁgādīkṣitara kruṣṇadīkṣitara putraru tirumaladīkṣitaru
kaḷenarasiṁhasōmayājigaḷu kalanūra mūlasvāmi basavapoḍeyara kumāra lakṣumaya yiṁtivara vubhayānumatadiṁ
I mūlapatrasādhanava baredāta lekhada siṁgayanu �yo krayadānapatrava koṭa mūlasvāmi baraha mūlasādhana
dali Idhāvu sākṣigaḷa barahavu mūlasādhanadali Idhāvu .
Digital edition of SII 9.582 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
